beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Angers SCO vs Olympique Lyonnais - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Angers SCO vs Olympique Lyonnais - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Angers have lost 33 of their 64 Ligue 1 matches against Lyon, more than against any other opponent in their top-flight history. Angers have conceded 120 goals against Lyon in the competition, at least 14 more than against any other team. Angers have lost 11 of their last 12 Ligue 1 matches against Lyon, the exception being a 3-0 home win in August 2021. Over the last eight seasons, only Paris SG  and Lille  have won more games against the same opponent in Ligue 1.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Lorient vs Paris FC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Lorient vs Paris FC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: FC Lorient have won each of their last eight home games against Paris FC in all competitions, always scoring more than one goal  and never conceding more than one goal. FC Lorient have picked up seven fewer points against teams in the bottom half of the table  than against teams in the top nine  in Ligue 1 this season, the largest such differential.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Monaco vs Olympique Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Monaco vs Olympique Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Since their return to Ligue 1 in 2013-14, Monaco have scored 50 goals against Marseille in the top-flight, their second-highest total behind Nantes. Having lost the reverse fixture, Monaco have not lost both of their Ligue 1 matches against Marseille in a single season since 2007-08.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Lille vs Lens - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Lille vs Lens - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Lille and Lens will face each other for the 122nd time in all competitions, with RCL having only played more against Monaco. Lille have beaten Lens 47 times in all competitions, their joint-most victories against a single opponent, level with Rennes. Lille have won nine of their last ten home games against Lens in Ligue 1, scoring 20 goals and conceding just five in this run, with the only exception being a 1-2 defeat in April 2022.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Angers SCO vs Olympique Lyonnais - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Angers SCO vs Olympique Lyonnais - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Angers have lost 33 of their 64 Ligue 1 matches against Lyon, more than against any other opponent in their top-flight history. Angers have conceded 120 goals against Lyon in the competition, at least 14 more than against any other team. Angers have lost 11 of their last 12 Ligue 1 matches against Lyon, the exception being a 3-0 home win in August 2021. Over the last eight seasons, only Paris SG  and Lille  have won more games against the same opponent in Ligue 1.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Lorient vs Paris FC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Lorient vs Paris FC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: FC Lorient have won each of their last eight home games against Paris FC in all competitions, always scoring more than one goal  and never conceding more than one goal. FC Lorient have picked up seven fewer points against teams in the bottom half of the table  than against teams in the top nine  in Ligue 1 this season, the largest such differential.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Le Havre vs Auxerre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Le Havre vs Auxerre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Le Havre have won each of their last three Ligue 1 matches against Auxerre, as many victories as in their first 28 top-flight encounters. Auxerre have avoided defeat in six of their last eight Ligue 1 matches, as many as in their first 19 games of the season.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Metz vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Metz vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Metz have won their last three matches against Nantes, all in Ligue 1, and have never had a longer winning streak against them in 113 meetings in all competitions. Metz have not lost any of their last seven home games against Nantes in Ligue 1, their longest current unbeaten run at home against a top-flight team.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Monaco vs Olympique Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Monaco vs Olympique Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Since their return to Ligue 1 in 2013-14, Monaco have scored 50 goals against Marseille in the top-flight, their second-highest total behind Nantes. OM have only conceded more goals against Paris SG in L1 during this period. Having lost the reverse fixture, Monaco have not lost both of their Ligue 1 matches against Marseille in a single season since 2007-08.

beIN SPORTS 4.desc: All the greatest moments and action in Ligue 1 including incredible stories and interviews featuring ligue 1 stars.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Brest vs Rennes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Brest vs Rennes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Brest have not won any of their last eight home games against Rennes in Ligue 1, since a 2-0 victory on 9 April 2011. Stade Brestois 29 have only had a longer winless run at home in the top-flight against Paris SG. Having lost 0-2 at Monaco and 0-3 at Auxerre, Brest could record three consecutive defeats without scoring in Ligue 1 for the first time in a single season since April 2013.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Paris Saint-Germain have kept 12 clean sheets against Toulouse in Ligue 1 during the QSI era, only doing better against Marseille.
